note_text: Wound note - Leftfoot. Meas 2.7x2.4x0.8cm. Heavy serosang drainage, no odor. Wound bed 79% gran, 21% slough. Periwound macerated. Foam dsg changed. Pt tolerated well. Dr. Thornton notified.

Subjective: Patient reports pain at Left foot wound site, rates 8/10.
Objective: Wound assessment performed. Diabetic diabetic Left foot measures 2.7 cm x 2.4 cm x 0.8 cm.
  Wound bed: 62% slough, 38% granulation tissue. Periwound: macerated.
  Drainage: heavy. Odor: present, foul.
Assessment: Diabetic diabetic Left foot — improving.
Plan: Negative pressure wound therapy initiated. Foam dressing change daily.
